title: Tadjyyyk
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Tadjyyyk''''' was a group of two [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]]s that carried personnel from the damaged [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Maximus]]'' before it was [[Defense of the Anvil|destroyed]]. The transports were able to make it to [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] [[Anvil (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Anvil'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

[[Category:Alliance to Restore the Republic starship groups]]
[[Category:Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports|*]]
